sections.name: QA Process
sections.content:
Welcome

Welcome to the buildee team! This guide will help you get started and provide essential resources to begin working effectively as part of the QA team.
Production app.buildee.comLive user-facing environment.
QA qa.buildee.com
Auto-deployed when code merges into the develop branch
Stagingstaging.buildee.com
Pre-production validation
Shares DB/users with prod
Most stable, hosts automation runs
Default test envQA

Tools Overview

JIRA https://simuwatt.atlassian.net/
Slack Team communication & CI notifications
Postman API testing
Playwright E2E browser automation framework

QA Workflow in Jira

QA validates all tickets in "Ready for QA" status. 

Once testing has passed, the ticket should be moved to ✅ Accepted by QA. If testing fails, move it to ❌ Rejected by QA.

QA Validation Requirements

Before closing a ticket, add validation results in the comments:
  • Scope of testing - What was tested and in which environment
  • Results - Pass/Fail for each scenario
  • Notes / Edge cases - Any noteworthy details, including edge cases covered

Defect Management Process

Defect Creation

Each defect must include:
Summary Short, descriptive title
Steps to Reproduce Numbered, deterministic steps
Expected Result What should happen
Actual Result What happens instead
AttachmentsScreenshots, recordings, logs
EnvironmentQA · Staging · Production
Priority & SeverityBusiness impact & urgency
Impacted ComponentArea of the product affected

Prioritization

🔴 High -> Add to current sprint · Assign directly to developer
🟡 Others -> Discuss during sprint planning with Matt

Production Validation

After deployment:
  1. Retest functionality in Production
  2. Verify the correct merge
  3. Confirm there are no environment-specific issues

Roles & Responsibilities

QA Responsibilities
  1. Validate tickets
  2. Document results
  3. Maintain TestRail
  4. Execute regression
  5. Report defects
  6. Perform production validation
 Development Responsibilities
  1. Provide proof of testing in tickets
  2. Provide impact assessment for complex changes
  3. Merge code to Production

Best Practices

  1. Keep Jira tickets clear and detailed
  2. Ensure all changes are testable
  3. Maintain QA Portal accuracy
  4. Prioritize based on business impact
  5. Always validate critical flows
